basis: export outputs require explicit human review before release
modifiable artifacts and non-overridable constraints must be visible
the round needs XML and bundle export for downstream consumption
the export layer must be approval-aware

reasons: The round contains explicit approval checkpoints before export release.
Exportable artifacts must remain reviewable and overridable by humans.
The round must emit structured XML and an export bundle.
The export layer should only serialize artifacts that have passed approval gates.

governance_and_feedback_mode.why: approval boundary and override scope must be explicit before export release

representation_and_serialization_mode.if_missing: loop back to semantic_clarification or branch_plan_generation depending on the missing export target
representation_and_serialization_mode.why: representation must wait for stable semantics and approval scope

mode_precedence.precedence_basis: approval checkpoint outranks export release timing
mode_precedence.note: Representation may prepare the export structure, but governance decides whether it may be treated as final.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Expose the concrete export candidate to approval checkpoints before final release.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Governance reviews an abstract export intention instead of the actual export payload.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Define whether approval or override changes require export regeneration or export blocking.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Serialization may finalize an export that governance has not authorized.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Define which representation targets require review and which constraints remain non-overridable.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Export selection may ignore release gating and non-overridable constraints.

interaction_notes.active_when: the round needs structured export but treats export release as an approval-governed act
interaction_notes.note: Separate export construction from export authorization.

profile_adjustment_recommendation.adjustment_reason: the co-create steady profile fit an approval-heavy export round because milestone feedback matters more than continuous exploratory narration
